regions.text: When it's too cold, the metal shrinks, moving the arm to turn on the heat. The thermostat's purpose is temperature control.
(Diagram: Thermostat arm moving to activate a radiator which emits heat waves).
In hot climates, we cool and dry indoor air. Ice chests use heat (electric or gas) to stay cold. Soon, solar heat may be used for cooling.
FUTURE: will dry. PRESENT: dry(ies). PAST: dried.
